sessions.notes: Use for one queued local task at a time when parallel lane-owner threads are under shared-account pressure.

sessions.last_error: Parallel 007 dispatch hit systemError / shared-account pressure; do not blast all lane threads until refreshed.
sessions.notes: When refresh is detected, mark available and rerun dispatch plan; otherwise keep parked.

boundary: Non-secret local capacity state only. No refresh tokens, credentials, browser sessions, account actions, service approvals, worker starts, public actions, spend, trade, APIs, or contact.
